name: Vistara Tote Bag
description: Spacious vegan leather tote with dual handles and a magnetic closure. Available in four fresh colourways — ideal for work and everyday carry.

name: Prizma Sling Bag
description: Compact vegan leather sling bag with an adjustable crossbody strap and top zip closure. Four vibrant colourways.

name: Vistapack
description: Structured vegan leather backpack with a padded back panel and dedicated laptop sleeve. Four colourways.

name: Sandesh Laptop Bag
description: Premium vegan leather laptop bag with a dedicated padded sleeve for up to 15" laptops. Four colourways.

name: Lekha Wallet
description: Compact vegan leather wallet with multiple card slots and a zippered coin pocket. Four fresh colourways.

name: Zippy Wallet
description: Zip-around wallet in vegan leather with a full-length bill compartment and card slots. Four colourways.

name: Large Aurelia Fan Tote
description: Statement large tote with a distinctive fan design in 100% PU leather. Two rich colourways.

name: Mini Aurelia Fan Tote
description: Compact mini tote with a distinctive fan design in 100% PU leather. Two rich colourways.

name: Valera Dome
description: Dome-shaped sling bag in 100% PU leather with a top zip and detachable crossbody strap. Four colourways.

name: Cordia Bag
description: Structured tote in 100% PU leather with dual handles and a top zip closure. Four bold colourways.

name: Halo Mini
description: Mini structured sling bag in 100% PU leather. Compact, chic, and versatile for any occasion. Five colourways.

name: Orwyn Backpack
description: Full-size vegan leather backpack with multiple compartments and padded straps. Two classic colourways.

name: Crescent Sling Bag
description: Crescent-shaped sling bag in vegan leather with an adjustable crossbody strap. Three colourways.

name: Business Laptop Briefcase
description: Professional PU leather laptop briefcase with a dedicated laptop compartment and organizer pockets. Two classic colourways.
